title.en: The Heavenly Ancestors were extremely puzzled.

content.en:
"Who took out the Xuantian platinum for auction?"

The Heavenly Ancestors were extremely puzzled.

But they didn't think too much about it, anyway, if someone was willing to auction, they would compete.

For them, one extra Xuantian platinum is excellent!

However, the auction of Xuantian Platinum is somewhat special, and it is not allowed to bid with Tongtian Realm Gold Coins, but with Tongtian True Gold Coins.

Tongtian True Gold Coin is a coin refined from Tongtian True Gold, which can be used for trading between Heavenly Ancestors.

Tongtian True Gold is useless to the Heavenly Ancestors, but it is too valuable to the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, and it is unimaginably valuable to a force.

Therefore, the Tongtian True Gold Coin is suitable for the Heavenly Ancestors to trade, and the grade of the Tongtian Realm Gold Coin is low.

The starting price of Xuantian platinum is 1,000 innocent gold coins, and those fifth-stage ancestors don't even have the qualifications to participate, so they can't take it out at all.

"1500 Innocent Gold Coins!"

"2000 Innocent Gold Coins!"

"2500 Innocent Gold Coins!"

These Heavenly Ancestors are bidding frantically, and they all want to bid for this Xuantian platinum.

In the end, one of the Heavenly Ancestors bid for this Xuantian platinum at a price of 3,200 Tongtian Innocence Gold Coins.

After the Xuantian platinum was auctioned off, other treasures were auctioned off one by one.

After a while, the last finale item came up.

"Next up is the last finale item to be auctioned - a True Dragon Realm Ruin Order!"

Qingli Ancestor said.

True Dragon Realm Ruin Order?

Ye Tian and the other Great Ancestors didn't know what this was, but those Heavenly Ancestors were shocked.

"True Dragon Realm Ruin Order, who came out of the True Dragon Realm Ruins?"

Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor was surprised.

Another Heavenly Ancestor said: "There are only thirty-six True Dragon Realm Ruin Orders, and those thirty-six Heavenly Ancestors have all entered the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order, and now there is a True Dragon Realm Ruin Order, there are only two possibilities, one is that it falls into the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and the token will automatically fly out." One is that there is a Heavenly Ancestor who came out of it, and he didn't dare to go in, so he directly auctioned off the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order!"

"Will the Heavenly Ancestor take out the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order for auction? I think there is a Heavenly Ancestor who has fallen in the True Dragon Realm Ruins!"

"However, I haven't heard of any Heavenly Ancestor who has fallen in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, there is still a way to pass on the news there!"

Just when these Heavenly Ancestors were talking, Qingli Great Ancestor revealed: "This True Dragon Realm Ruin Order comes from our Dongao Heavenly Ancestor of Falcon Dragon City, and this True Dragon Realm Ruin Order is no longer of much use to him, so he will take it out for auction." Again, only genuine gold coin auctions will be accepted. "

"It turned out that Dongao Tianzu came out!"

A group of Heavenly Ancestors were slightly surprised.

Immediately, they were speculating why Dongao Heavenly Ancestor didn't need the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order?

Come to think of it, there's only one possibility.

"Could it be that Dongao Tianzu has broken through?"

If this is really the case, then the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order is indeed of little use to Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, and it is also reasonable to put it up for auction and exchange it for some Tongtian True Gold Coins.

"What the hell is the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order?"

An invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestor asked curiously.

Although most of the Fifth Stage Great Ancestors didn't know, there were still those who knew.

At this time, a fifth-stage Great Ancestor revealed: "The True Dragon Realm Ruins are a special place, even the Heavenly Ancestor can't enter them, and they must rely on the True Dragon Realm Ruins Order, it is said that there are many opportunities in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and of course there are dangers." There are also some Heavenly Ancestors who have fallen in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, but there are also many Heavenly Ancestors who have gained a real great opportunity in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, so that their strength has skyrocketed, surpassing other Heavenly Ancestors. "

"I see!"

Many Great Ancestors nodded, and they understood.

However, they are not qualified to compete for the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order at the moment, and even if they are really given to them, they will not dare to enter the True Dragon Realm Ruins!

Immediately, these Heavenly Ancestors began to compete frantically for the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order, and the starting price was 5,000 Innocence Gold Coins.

"6,000 Innocent Gold Coins!"

"7,000 Innocence Gold Coins!"

"8,000 Innocent Gold Coins!"

Before you know it, the auction price of the True Dragon Realm Ruins Order has soared to more than 10,000, and it is still soaring.

After all, for some Heavenly Ancestors, the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order represents hope!

The starting price of 5,000 Tong Innocent Gold Coins is too low, even 50,000 Tong Innocent Gold Coins cannot be bought.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for the bidding price of the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order to soar to 50,000, and there were still seven or eight Heavenly Ancestors competing.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian received a summons from a Heavenly Ancestor: "Are you innocent and willing to trade it to me, ask for it to be mentioned casually!"

He was stunned at first, but soon understood what the reason was.

Obviously, this Heavenly Ancestor's Tongtian True Gold Coin was not enough, so he wanted to trade Tongtian True Gold from these Great Ancestors present, so as to bid for this True Dragon Realm Ruin Order.

Ye Tian thought about it for a while, and then sent a message back: "Qinghe Heavenly Ancestor, if you have the Immortal Boundary Stone, I can trade the Tongtian True Gold for you!"

"I don't have an Immortal Boundary Stone, but do you want to refuse the friendship of a Heavenly Ancestor?" the other party seemed to be threatening Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian directly ignored the other party.

He felt that there must be more than one Heavenly Ancestor who was willing to trade with him, and if the other Heavenly Ancestors had the Immortal Boundary Stone in their hands, he could gather the last material, and then he could cultivate the Heaven Slaying Blade.

Once he has cultivated the Heaven Slaying Blade, he definitely has the fifth stage combat power of the Boundary Breaking Level, and he will not be afraid of the Qinghe Heavenly Ancestor.

Soon, another Heavenly Ancestor contacted him.

However, this Heavenly Ancestor still did not have the Immortal Boundary Stone.

This is not to the extent that the Immortal Boundary Stone is so precious that the Heavenly Ancestors do not have it, it is just that the Heavenly Ancestors just don't have this kind of material.

"Endless Great Ancestor, I am Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, you once took over my task, do you have Tongtian True Gold on you?" Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor just asked tentatively, and did not expect to really trade Tongtian True Gold from Ye Tian.

"Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, I do have the Heavenly Pure Gold, if you trade the Immortal Boundary Stone, I am willing to trade. Ye Tian replied.

"Immortal Boundary Stone, I do have that thing, how much do you want?" asked Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor.

"All of them!" Ye Tian said.

"Okay, one Immortal Boundary Stone for one Heavenly Innocence Gold, I have eighteen Immortal Boundary Stones on my body!" Yin Heng Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed to the deal.

Soon, both sides took out the treasures and traded directly on the spot, and Qingli Dazu would not care about this matter.

After the transaction was completed, Ye Tian obtained eighteen Immortal Boundary Stones.
